languages.text: "Понял. Я отправлю им послание, что у 32-го только один покровитель. Вместе с крак-гранатой". {n}Поймав ваш взгляд, Иждриг ухмыляется.{/n} "Невзведенной, Ваша Светлость".
"Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Понял. Я отправлю им послание, что у 32-го только один покровитель. Вместе с крак-гранатой". {n}Поймав ваш взгляд, Иждриг ухмыляется.{/n} "Невзведенной, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. It will be delivered along with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "Unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"If that's true, then why were the nobles on Dargonus swarming all over me? Perhaps they misread the battlefield. I'll make it clear to them that the 32nd has only one patron."

"Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. It will be delivered along with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "Unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「もしそうなら、なぜドラゴナスにいる貴族たちが私を襲ったのか。戦場を誤読したのかもしれない。32番隊には1人の庇護者しかいないことを、彼らに明確に伝えよう」
languages.original_text: "If that's true, then why were the nobles on Dargonus swarming all over me? Perhaps they misread the battlefield. I'll make it clear to them that the 32nd has only one patron."

languages.text: "Anlaşıldı. Onlara 32. Alay'ın tek bir hamisi olduğuna dair mesaj ileteceğim. Yanında da bir krak bombası." {n}Gözünün içine bakan İzdrig gülümsüyor.{/n} "Pimi çekilmemiş hâlde tabii {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Anlaşıldı. Onlara 32. Alay'ın tek bir hamisi olduğuna dair mesaj ileteceğim. Yanında da bir krak bombası." {n}Gözünün içine bakan İzdrig gülümsüyor.{/n} "Pimi çekilmemiş hâlde tabii {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: “明白。我会给他们捎个信儿，告诉他们第32团只有一个庇护人。就用穿甲手雷送过去。”{n}伊兹德里格对上你的目光，露出笑容。{/n}“不带引信的那种，大人。”
languages.original_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “明白。我会给他们捎个信儿，告诉他们第32团只有一个庇护人。就用穿甲手雷送过去。”{n}伊兹德里格对上你的目光，露出笑容。{/n}“不带引信的那种，大人。”

languages.text: "Verstanden. Ich werde sie informieren, dass das 32. nur einen Befehlshaber hat. Mit einer Sprenggranate." {n}Izdrig sieht dich grinsend an.{/n} "Ein unbewaffnetes, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Verstanden. Ich werde sie informieren, dass das 32. nur einen Befehlshaber hat. Mit einer Sprenggranate." {n}Izdrig sieht dich grinsend an.{/n} "Ein unbewaffnetes, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: « Je comprends. Je leur ferai savoir que le 32e n'a qu'{mf|un seul protecteur|une seule protectrice}... avec une grenade Krak. » {n}Izdrig croise votre regard et sourit.{/n} « Désarmée, bien évidemment, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends. Je leur ferai savoir que le 32e n'a qu'{mf|un seul protecteur|une seule protectrice}... avec une grenade Krak. » {n}Izdrig croise votre regard et sourit.{/n} « Désarmée, bien évidemment, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: «Entendido. Les informaré de que el 32.º solo tiene un patrón... con una granada perforante». {n}Al ver tu mirada, Izdrig sonríe.{/n} «Sin armar, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Entendido. Les informaré de que el 32.º solo tiene un patrón... con una granada perforante». {n}Al ver tu mirada, Izdrig sonríe.{/n} «Sin armar, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
